description: Provided IT support across the Cincinnati and Sharonville offices, with remote phone support for other Midwest locations. Worked through a backlogged ticket queue and handled a range of on-site and remote support tasks. Documented and improved the employee onboarding workflow, clarifying system handoffs and reducing manual steps for new hires. Built a new MDT image that automated Lenovo driver installation, domain controller enrollment, and Windows 11 upgrades, reducing the manual work required per deployment.
highlights: Engineered PowerShell scripts for Active Directory provisioning at a 1,200+ employee organization, reducing manual setup time by 40%.
Deployed Windows systems via MDT and SCCM imaging workflows, supporting 180+ retail locations nationwide.

description: Managed hardware through its full lifecycle, from PXE boot deployment using department-specific images to staging end-of-life machines for destruction. Coordinated equipment moves under deadlines and handled the pre-imaging checklist including I/O verification, UEFI-compatible adapters, and BIOS configuration.
highlights: Provisioned 50+ workstations for a Fortune 500 freight brokerage, streamlining new-hire onboarding across multiple offices.
Achieved same-day turnaround on 90% of hardware repair tickets.
Documented 200+ technical support cases in Jira, building out the team knowledge base.

focusAreas: E-commerce fulfillment, inventory management, Jan 2025 – Present
description: Maintain 98%+ pick-rate and 51%+ perfect-order accuracy on 100+ daily orders using inventory management and POS systems in a high-throughput, time-sensitive environment.

focusAreas: AV/IT setup, event support, Aug 2023 – Dec 2024
description: Configured AV and IT systems for 100+ campus events annually. Troubleshot connectivity issues in real-time, maintaining 99% uptime for 46,000+ students and university guests.
Managed front desk operations for a university residential hall. Enforced housing policies, processed parcels, and escalated safety concerns appropriately.
